meaning: n.德干(印度南部的一高原)
examples: So in 2003 Mr Gopinath launched India's first low-cost carrier, Air Deccan, and started a craze.
Kingfisher Airlines, which is owned by the UB group, a big drinks company, is buying part of Air Deccan.
One theory suggests the Deccan lavas spewed immense amounts of poisonous sulfur dioxide gas into the atmosphere.
And most important, the Indian low-cost carrier arrived in 2003 with the advent of Air Deccan.
Another listed private gold miner, Deccan Gold Mines, also wants to speed up operations.
